arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag faces making more unwanted Man United history with 41-year record at risk
arts.sum: Man United will be determined to get their first Europa League win of the season on the board against Fenerbahce.

arts.ttl: Edgar Davids reveals 'unbelievable' experience that almost led to Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: Edgar Davids found Ferguson "funny, charming and intelligent" when he spoke to him and says he was tempted to join Manchester United

arts.ttl: Gareth Southgate tipped for Premier League job after ruling out becoming Man Utd manager
arts.sum: Gareth Southgate recently vowed to take a year out from management after leaving his role as England boss in July, despite emerging as a target for Manchester United

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Fenerbahce
arts.sum: Here's the team Ten Hag could pick to face Fenerbahce on Matchday 3 of the Europa League on Thursday night. Mazraoui has been a mainstay in Ten Hag's XI since joining the club and he should return to the team on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Manchester United scout attends Napoli match to watch Kvaratskhelia and Buongiorno
arts.sum: During the recent Serie A match between Empoli and Napoli, a Manchester United scout was present to closely observe two standout players from the Neapolitan side: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and Alessandro Buongiorno. TMW report how this scouting mission highlights the Red Devils’ interest in these players as they continue to explore potential acquisitions from Serie A. Kvaratskhelia, the Georgian winger whose contract with Napoli runs until 2027, has been a focal point of interest. His decisive penalty in the match likely left a positive impression on the Manchester United emissary. Despite ongoing discussions for a contract renewal, progress has stalled since The post Manchester United scout attends Napoli match to watch Kvaratskhelia and Buongiorno appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Xavi is one of Man United's oldest foes who left Sir Alex Ferguson 'dizzy' on the Barcelona 'carousel' in TWO Champions League finals and had Wayne Rooney begging for mercy
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola once told a young Xavi 'you will retire me' at Barcelona. That prophecy could soon be reignited with another layer of meaning.

arts.ttl: Sack verdict, behind-the-scenes issues - Jose Mourinho true feelings clear before Man Utd reunion
arts.sum: Former Manchester United manager Jose Mourinho is preparing to welcome his old club to Turkey on Thursday evening in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho shows true colours with offer to journalists ahead of Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has been staying in the Four Seasons hotel in Istanbul since being appointed as Fenerbahce boss and told an English journalist he was welcome to his room

arts.ttl: Man Utd Have Four Manager Shortlist if They Sack Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Former Liverpool target Ruben Amorim is among those sounded out as Erik Ten Hag's replacement.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Could Antony join another Premier League club in January?
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly contacted by a number of Premier League clubs over the possibility of signing Antony on loan during the winter transfer window.
